titles.title: Seek Ye First the Kingdom of God

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Seek ye first the kingdom of God And His righteousness And all these things shall be added unto you Hallelu, Hallelujah!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Man does not live by bread alone But by every word That proceeds from the mouth of God Hallelu, Hallelujah!

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Ask, and it shall be given unto you Seek and ye shall find Knock, and the door shall be opened unto you Hallelu, Hallelujah!
